innateAbility.name: Mistwoods Wayfarer
innateAbility.description: Has a chance to redirect incoming attacks to a nearby tree, destroying it in the process.The tree search radius is centered around Hoodwink.

abilities.name: Acorn Shot
abilities.description: Fires an acorn attack on the unit-targeted enemy.The acorn bounces to nearby targets, slowing them and dealing a percentage of Hoodwink's attack with bonus damage.

abilities.name: Bushwhack
abilities.description: Tosses a net trap that stuns enemy heroes if they are near a tree in the area-targeted location.Applies damage over time to all debuff-affected enemy units.

abilities.name: Scurry
abilities.description: When activated, Hoodwink gains bonus movement speed, phased movement, and tree-walking for a brief time.

abilities.name: Decoy
abilities.description: Turns invisible instantaneously while increasing her movement speed.

abilities.name: Hunter's Boomerang
abilities.description: Tosses a boomerang in an arc that deals damage as it pass through enemy units.

abilities.name: Sharpshooter
abilities.description: Charges up and fires a deadly bolt from her crossbow.After winding up for a while, the bolt is fired automatically and Hoodwink is knocked back for a distance from the force of the shot.

abilities.name: End Sharpshooter
abilities.description: Release the charged shot, regain ability to move and attack.

talents.right: Sharpshooter Grants Vision and True Sight During Wind-up
